prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-10, what will be the average price (in yuan per kilogram) of lamb at the national agricultural product wholesale market monitored by the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Affairs of China?"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-10, what will be the average price (in yuan per kilogram) of lamb at the national agricultural product wholesale market monitored by the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Affairs of China?
